headline: Visa Destinations Launches in Asia Pacific as Regional Travel Remains Resilient
summary: Visa, a global leader in digital payments, today announced the expansion of its global, experience-led travel programme, Visa Destinations, into Asia Pacific, launching in Thailand as the first market, with Singapore set to follow in 2026. Designed around how travellers increasingly choose to explore the world, Visa Destinations connects cardholders to curated and unique destination-led experiences and offers, shaped by culture, craft, and local insight – helping them plan and experience trips a

headline: Visa Expands Into Gaming AI Commerce And Multi Chain Stablecoins
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) has launched a multi-year partnership with EA SPORTS to create new in-game experiences and rewards for players. The company is expanding its Agentic Ready AI-commerce program across Asia Pacific and Latin America to help partners prepare for AI agent-initiated transactions. Visa has also added five new blockchains to its stablecoin settlement pilot, broadening its multi-chain payment capabilities. Visa, trading at around $326.85, is moving further beyond card-based payments...
